words.exampleArabic: تَتْرُكُ التَّنْشِئَةُ أَثَرًا كَبِيرًا فِي شَخْصِيَّةِ الإِنْسَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Odgoj ostavlja veliki trag na ličnost čovjeka.
words.exampleEn: Upbringing leaves a great mark on a person's character.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَلِّمُ الآبَاءُ أَطْفَالَهُمُ الانْضِبَاطَ مُنْذُ الصِّغَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Roditelji uče svoju djecu disciplini od malih nogu.
words.exampleEn: Parents teach their children discipline from a young age.

words.exampleArabic: اقْتَسَمَ الأَبْنَاءُ الْمِيرَاثَ بِالتَّسَاوِي.
words.exampleBs: Djeca su ravnopravno podijelila nasljedstvo.
words.exampleEn: The children divided the inheritance equally.

words.exampleArabic: مَنَحَتِ الْمَحْكَمَةُ الأُمَّ حَضَانَةَ الأَطْفَالِ.
words.exampleBs: Sud je majci dodijelio starateljstvo nad djecom.
words.exampleEn: The court granted the mother custody of the children.

words.exampleArabic: تَعِيشُ الْعَائِلَةُ الْمُمْتَدَّةُ فِي مَنَازِلَ مُتَجَاوِرَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Šira porodica živi u susjednim kućama.
words.exampleEn: The extended family lives in neighbouring houses.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَكَوَّنُ الأُسْرَةُ النَّوَوِيَّةُ مِنَ الأَبَوَيْنِ وَالأَطْفَالِ فَقَطْ.
words.exampleBs: Nuklearna porodica sastoji se samo od roditelja i djece.
words.exampleEn: The nuclear family consists of parents and children only.

words.exampleArabic: يُرَبِّي الْوَالِدُ الأَحَدُ أَطْفَالَهُ بِجُهْدٍ وَتَفَانٍ.
words.exampleBs: Samohrani roditelj odgaja svoju djecu s trudom i predanošću.
words.exampleEn: The single parent raises their children with effort and dedication.

words.exampleArabic: أَقَدَمَتِ الزَّوْجَانِ عَلَى التَّبَنِّي بَعْدَ دِرَاسَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Supružnici su se odlučili na usvajanje nakon dugog promišljanja.
words.exampleEn: The couple proceeded with adoption after lengthy deliberation.

words.exampleArabic: تَوَلَّى الْعَمُّ وِصَايَةَ الأَطْفَالِ بَعْدَ وَفَاةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Amidža je preuzeo skrbništvo nad djecom nakon smrti roditelja.
words.exampleEn: The uncle assumed guardianship of the children after the parents' death.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ عَلَى قَرْضٍ بِرَهْنٍ عَقَارِيٍّ لِشِرَاءِ الْمَنْزِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica je uzela hipotekarni kredit za kupovinu kuće.
words.exampleEn: The family obtained a mortgage loan to buy the house.

words.exampleArabic: يَدْفَعُ الإِيجَارَ فِي بِدَايَةِ كُلِّ شَهْرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Plaća kiriju na početku svakog mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: He pays the rent at the beginning of every month.

words.exampleArabic: تَكَلَّمَ الْمُسْتَأْجِرُ مَعَ صَاحِبِ الْعَقَارِ حَوْلَ الإِصْلَاحَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Stanar je razgovarao s vlasnikom nekretnine o popravcima.
words.exampleEn: The tenant spoke with the landlord about repairs.

words.exampleArabic: الْمُسْتَأْجِرُ مُلْتَزِمٌ بِدَفْعِ الإِيجَارِ فِي مَوْعِدِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Stanar se obavezao plaćati kiriju na vrijeme.
words.exampleEn: The tenant is committed to paying the rent on time.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَتْ أَسْعَارُ الْعَقَارَاتِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Cijene nekretnina u gradu su porasle.
words.exampleEn: Property prices in the city have risen.

words.exampleArabic: خَضَعَ الْمَنْزِلُ لِتَجْدِيدٍ شَامِلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kuća je prošla kroz sveobuhvatnu renovaciju.
words.exampleEn: The house underwent a comprehensive renovation.

words.exampleArabic: اهْتَمَّتِ الزَّوْجَةُ بِالتَّصْمِيمِ الدَّاخِلِيِّ لِمَنْزِلِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Supruga je vodila brigu o unutrašnjem uređenju svog doma.
words.exampleEn: The wife paid attention to the interior design of her home.

words.exampleArabic: تَرْتَفِعُ فَوَاتِيرُ الْخَدَمَاتِ فِي فَصْلِ الشِّتَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Komunalni računi rastu zimi.
words.exampleEn: Utility bills rise in winter.

words.exampleArabic: أَقَامَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ حَفْلَةَ خِطْبَةٍ بَهِيجَةً.
words.exampleBs: Porodica je priredila veselu zaručničku svečanost.
words.exampleEn: The family held a joyful engagement party.

words.exampleArabic: حَضَرَ حَفْلَ الزَّفَافِ مَئَةٌ وَخَمْسُونَ ضَيْفًا.
words.exampleBs: Vjenčanju je prisustvovalo sto pedeset gostiju.
words.exampleEn: One hundred and fifty guests attended the wedding ceremony.

words.exampleArabic: مَرَّ الطَّلَاقُ بِمَرَاحِلَ قَانُونِيَّةٍ مُعَقَّدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Razvod je prošao kroz složene pravne faze.
words.exampleEn: The divorce went through complicated legal stages.

words.exampleArabic: حَضَرَ أَفْرَادُ الْعَائِلَةِ مَرَاسِمَ الدَّفْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Članovi porodice su prisustvovali sahrani.
words.exampleEn: Family members attended the funeral.

words.exampleArabic: أَقَامَ الأَهْلُ عَقِيقَةً احْتِفَالًا بِمَوْلِدِ الطِّفْلِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica je priredila akiku slavlje za rođenje djeteta.
words.exampleEn: The family held an aqiqah to celebrate the birth of the child.

words.exampleArabic: تَقُومُ الْعَلَاقَاتُ الْأُسَرِيَّةُ عَلَى الثِّقَةِ الْمُتَبَادَلَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodični odnosi temelje se na uzajamnom povjerenju.
words.exampleEn: Family relationships are built on mutual trust.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ الْوَفَاءُ مِنْ أَهَمِّ قِيَمِ الْأُسْرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Lojalnost se smatra jednom od najvažnijih porodičnih vrijednosti.
words.exampleEn: Loyalty is considered one of the most important family values.

words.exampleArabic: تَعَلَّمَ الأَبْنَاءُ تَحَمُّلَ الْمَسْؤُولِيَّةِ مُبَكِّرًا.
words.exampleBs: Djeca su naučila preuzimati odgovornost rano.
words.exampleEn: The children learned to take on responsibility early.

words.exampleArabic: يُضَحِّي الْوَالِدَانِ بِكَثِيرٍ مِنْ أَجْلِ سَعَادَةِ أَطْفَالِهِمَا.
words.exampleBs: Roditelji se mnogo odriču zaради sreće svoje djece.
words.exampleEn: Parents sacrifice a lot for the happiness of their children.

words.exampleArabic: وَجَدَتِ الابْنَةُ الدَّعْمَ الْكَامِلَ مِنْ عَائِلَتِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Kći je pronašla punu podršku od svoje porodice.
words.exampleEn: The daughter found full support from her family.

words.exampleArabic: تَجَاوَزَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ الْخِلَافَ بِالْحِوَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica je nesuglasicu prevladala dijalogom.
words.exampleEn: The family overcame the conflict through dialogue.

words.exampleArabic: أَدَّتِ الْمُصَالَحَةُ إِلَى إِعَادَةِ الأُسْرَةِ وَاحِدَةً مُتَمَاسِكَةً.
words.exampleBs: Pomirenje je dovelo do ponovnog ujedinjenja porodice.
words.exampleEn: The reconciliation led to the family reuniting as one.

words.exampleArabic: تَقَعُ مَدْرَسَةُ الأَطْفَالِ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ السَّكَنِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Škola djece nalazi se u stambenoj zoni.
words.exampleEn: The children's school is located in the residential area.

words.exampleArabic: يَضُمُّ مَجَمَّعُ الشُّقَقِ مَسْبَحًا وَمَلْعَبًا.
words.exampleBs: Stambeni kompleks ima bazen i igralište.
words.exampleEn: The apartment complex has a swimming pool and a playground.

words.exampleArabic: تَقَعُ الْفِيلَّا فِي حَيٍّ هَادِئٍ خَارِجَ الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Vila se nalazi u mirnoj četvrti izvan grada.
words.exampleEn: The villa is located in a quiet neighbourhood outside the city.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَقَلَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ مِنَ الْمَدِينَةِ إِلَى الضَّاحِيَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica se preselila iz grada u predgrađe.
words.exampleEn: The family moved from the city to the suburb.

words.exampleArabic: حَيُّنَا هَادِئٌ وَالنَّاسُ فِيهِ مُتَعَاوِنُونَ.
words.exampleBs: Naša četvrt je mirna i njeni stanovnici su suradljivi.
words.exampleEn: Our neighbourhood is quiet and its people are cooperative.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَوَلَّى الْبَلَدِيَّةُ صِيَانَةَ الطُّرُقِ وَالْحَدَائِقِ.
words.exampleBs: Općina se brine o održavanju cesta i parkova.
words.exampleEn: The municipality is responsible for maintaining roads and parks.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْمَلُ الأَعْيَادُ عَلَى تَقْوِيَةِ الرَّوَابِطِ الأُسَرِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Praznici rade na jačanju porodičnih veza.
words.exampleEn: Holidays work to strengthen family ties.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْعَى كَثِيرُونَ إِلَى تَحْقِيقِ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi nastoje postići ravnotežu između posla i života.
words.exampleEn: Many people seek to achieve a work-life balance.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْرِصُ الأُسْرَةُ عَلَى تَوَارُثِ الْقِيَمِ الأُسَرِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica nastoji prenijeti porodične vrijednosti s koljena na koljeno.
words.exampleEn: The family is keen on passing down family values through generations.

words.exampleArabic: وَرِثَ الأَبْنَاءُ الْمَنْزِلَ عَنْ جَدِّهِمْ.
words.exampleBs: Djeca su naslijedila kuću od svog djeda.
words.exampleEn: The children inherited the house from their grandfather.

words.exampleArabic: تَصَالَحَ الإِخْوَةُ بَعْدَ سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ الْخِلَافِ.
words.exampleBs: Braća su se pomirila nakon godina nesuglasice.
words.exampleEn: The brothers reconciled after years of conflict.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَقَلَتِ الأُسْرَةُ إِلَى مَنْزِلٍ أَكْبَرَ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica se preselila u veću kuću.
words.exampleEn: The family moved to a larger house.

words.en: to be raised, to grow up
words.exampleArabic: تَرَبَّى فِي بَيْئَةٍ أُسَرِيَّةٍ دَافِئَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Odrastao je u toplom porodičnom okruženju.
words.exampleEn: He grew up in a warm family environment.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَأْجَرَ الشَّابُّ شَقَّةً صَغِيرَةً فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mladić je iznajmio mali stan u centru grada.
words.exampleEn: The young man rented a small apartment in the city centre.

words.exampleArabic: جَدَّدَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ مَنْزِلَهَا الْقَدِيمَ بِالْكَامِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica je u potpunosti renovirala svoju staru kuću.
words.exampleEn: The family completely renovated their old house.
